title: Logical error: 'Build text index transform not found for part all_1_1_1'
description:
### Describe the bug
cc @CurtizJ, this error happens in the current master; maybe it's related to the TTL definition? The index is created on a string generating function from an integer.
@fm4v progress on this 👍
### How to reproduce
Run:
```sql
SET enable_full_text_index =1;
CREATE TABLE t0 (c0 Int, INDEX i0 murmurHash3_128(c0) TYPE text(tokenizer = sparseGrams), c1 DateTime MATERIALIZED now()) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY tuple() TTL c1 + INTERVAL 1 MICROSECOND DELETE;
INSERT INTO TABLE t0 (c0) VALUES (1);
DELETE FROM t0 WHERE c0 = 1;
```
### Error message and/or stacktrace
Stack trace:
```
<Fatal> : Logical error: 'Build text index transform not found for part all_1_1_1'.
<Fatal> : Format string: 'Build text index transform not found for part {}'.
<Fatal> : Stack trace (when copying this message, always include the lines below):
0. contrib/llvm-project/libcxx/include/__exception/exception.h:113: Poco::Exception::Exception(String const&, int) @ 0x0000000026499572
1. src/Common/Exception.cpp:136: DB::Exception::Exception(DB::Exception::MessageMasked&&, int, bool) @ 0x00000000161b37e9
2. src/Common/Exception.h:172: DB::Exception::Exception(String&&, int, String, bool) @ 0x000000000d801bd4
3. src/Common/Exception.h:58: DB::Exception::Exception(PreformattedMessage&&, int) @ 0x000000000d8016d1
4. src/Common/Exception.h:190: DB::Exception::Exception<String const&>(int, FormatStringHelperImpl<std::type_identity<String const&>::type>, String const&) @ 0x000000000d813603
5. src/Storages/MergeTree/MergeTask.cpp:1707: DB::MergeTask::MergeTextIndexStage::getTextIndexSegments(String const&, String const&, unsigned long) const @ 0x000000001f85123e
6. src/Storages/MergeTree/MergeTask.cpp:1748: DB::MergeTask::MergeTextIndexStage::prepare() const @ 0x000000001f8514be

8. src/Storages/MergeTree/MergeTask.cpp:1882: DB::MergeTask::execute() @ 0x000000001f8504f7
9. src/Storages/MergeTree/MergePlainMergeTreeTask.cpp:59: DB::MergePlainMergeTreeTask::executeStep() @ 0x000000001f83908e
10. src/Storages/MergeTree/MergeTreeBackgroundExecutor.h:74: DB::TaskRuntimeData::executeStep() const @ 0x000000001f88255f

12. src/Storages/MergeTree/MergeTreeBackgroundExecutor.cpp:423: DB::MergeTreeBackgroundExecutor<DB::DynamicRuntimeQueue>::threadFunction() @ 0x000000001f8896af
13. contrib/llvm-project/libcxx/include/__functional/function.h:508: ? @ 0x0000000016300879
14. contrib/llvm-project/libcxx/include/__type_traits/invoke.h:0: ThreadFromGlobalPoolImpl<false, true>::ThreadFromGlobalPoolImpl<void (ThreadPoolImpl<ThreadFromGlobalPoolImpl<false, true>>::ThreadFromThreadPool::*)(), ThreadPoolImpl<ThreadFromGlobalPoolImpl<false, true>>::ThreadFromThreadPool*>(void (ThreadPoolImpl<ThreadFromGlobalPoolImpl<false, true>>::ThreadFromThreadPool::*&&)(), ThreadPoolImpl<ThreadFromGlobalPoolImpl<false, true>>::ThreadFromThreadPool*&&)::'lambda'()::operator()() @ 0x0000000016306c68
```

bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (c0 INT, c1 VARCHAR(255), c2 TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO t1 (c0, c1) VALUES (2, NULL);
SELECT * FROM t1 WHERE c1 = 'test' OR c2 IS NULL;
